Viking.text:
Wind
In west, variable 3 or less becoming southeasterly 3 or 4. In east, northerly or northeasterly 4 to 6, becoming variable 3 or 4 in east.
Sea state
In west, moderate or rough, becoming mainly moderate later. in east, moderate or rough at first, otherwise slight or moderate.
Weather
In west, rain later. In east, mainly fair.
Visibility
In west, good, occasionally moderate later. In east, good.
